title: Get started with TextUI Designer
description: Create a TextUI screen, preview it, edit it live, inspect export output, and open a flow preview without leaving VS Code.

steps.title: Create a sample .tui.yml file
steps.description: Create a file named `hello.tui.yml` and paste the minimal sample from the README or `sample/01-basic/sample.tui.yml`. Success: the file is saved with a `page` block and at least one component.

steps.title: Open Preview
steps.description: Run [TextUI: Preview Current File](command:textui-designer.openPreview) while the `.tui.yml` file is active. Success: a side panel renders the current screen.

steps.title: Edit and watch the Preview update
steps.description: Change text or a button label in the YAML file, then save or let auto preview refresh. Success: the Preview reflects the edit and the update indicator appears when enabled.

steps.title: Inspect Export Preview
steps.description: Run [TextUI: Export Preview (Dry Run)](command:textui-designer.export-preview) to inspect generated code before writing files. Success: generated output is shown without changing project files.

steps.title: Open Flow Preview
steps.description: Open `sample/12-navigation/app.tui.flow.yml`, then run [TextUI: Preview Flow](command:textui-designer.openFlowPreview). Success: the flow map opens and linked screens can be inspected.
